description: Per-session care attestation. PRIVACY INVARIANT: encryptedPayloadCid mandatory (XChaCha20 envelope per ADR-2605181100); schema additionalProperties=false rejects any plaintext content field. Aggregate-only public fields. Per ADR-2605261030.

encryptedPayloadCid.description: PRIVACY INVARIANT: REQUIRED; all care content encrypted

consentRecordCid.description: G3: REQUIRED; default-deny absent valid consent

durationMinutes.description: Aggregate-public field; for caregiver work-cap G10 + multi-gen ratio G14

emergencyEscalation.description: G11: mitate G5 emergency keyword trigger flag
